title: Chewy Canadian Mushroom Burgers
description: A delicious and healthy vegan alternative to traditional burgers. Made with flavorful mushrooms and a hint of sour flavor.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced mushrooms, unsweetened non-dairy sour cream, rolled oats, dried Canadian spices, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well until everything is fully incorporated.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into 4-6 patties.
Place the patties in the preheated skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve hot on a bun with your favorite toppings.
